author: JD
description: A Todoist tasks board with sidebar and embedded views. Full 2-way sync. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: JD
manifest.description: Display Todoist tasks as draggable cards with full sync support.
manifest.name: Todoist Board

name: Todoist Board

releases.author: propranolol11
releases.description:
## What's new

- Todoist API tokens now use Obsidian Secret Storage when available, keeping tokens out of the plugin data file.
- Existing plugin-data tokens migrate automatically when Secret Storage is available.
- Older Obsidian versions continue to use the previous plugin-data fallback.
- The settings screen and README now explain the token storage change.

## Upgrade note

If your tasks do not load after updating to 2.1.0, open Todoist Board settings and re-enter your Todoist API token.

## Validation

- npm run verify
releases.name: Todoist Board 2.1.0

releases.author: propranolol11
releases.description:
## Todoist Board 2.0.9

Reliability and interaction polish release.

### Changed
- Harden Todoist REST and Sync API error handling so failed responses surface instead of silently appearing successful.
- Preserve cached task rendering only for offline/network fallback cases.
- Prevent duplicate global lifecycle listeners and narrow plugin unload cleanup.
- Improve polling with token/offline skips, an in-flight guard, and one metadata refresh per changed cycle.
- Fix right-sidebar command activation when the Todoist Board view is newly created.
- Update selected-card chin bar behavior so priority state is visible and focus clears after quick actions.
- Polish the toolbar filter customization modal, including visible default-theme drag handles.

### Validation
- npm run verify

releases.author: propranolol11
releases.description:
## Todoist Board 2.0.8

### Changes
- Improved mobile Add Task modal interactions with keyboard-preserving Date, Deadline, Priority, and Label controls.
- Added custom Date/Deadline calendar controls with Cancel actions and keyboard-aware mobile placement.
- Added Cancel to the label picker.
- Kept selected task cards selected while using chin bar actions and made Edit/Priority compact icon-only actions.
- Cleaned up recurring task indicators so the due date is the single generated repeat signal.
- Improved selected-card description placement, contrast, and overflow-only chevron behavior.

### Validation
- npm run verify

Release assets: main.js, manifest.json, styles.css.

releases.author: propranolol11
releases.description:
## What's changed
- Refined selected-task chin bar layout and styling across sidebar widths.
- Added mobile-friendly expandable task descriptions.
- Reworked settings tabs into Preferences and Advanced.
- Added Add Task modal visibility preferences for Date, Deadline, Priority, Project, and Labels.
- Added a `...` shortcut in the Add Task modal to jump directly to those preferences.
- Improved Add Task modal mobile keyboard behavior for date, deadline, priority, and label controls.
- Compact priority controls and renamed the due-date chip to Date.

## Validation
- npm run typecheck
- npm run lint:obsidian
- npm test
- npm run build

releases.author: propranolol11

Patch release for Todoist Board 2.0.6.

Changes:

releases.author: propranolol11
releases.description:
Scanner-focused patch release for Todoist Board 2.0.5.

Assets included for Obsidian installation:
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css

Changes:
- Removed clipboard API usage from the toolbar.
- Cleaned empty catch blocks reported by the community scanner.
- Added GitHub Actions provenance workflow for release asset attestations.
releases.name: Todoist Board 2.0.5

releases.author: propranolol11
releases.description:
Patch release for Obsidian community scorecard cleanup.

Assets included for Obsidian installation:
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css

Changes:
- Removed explicit any usage from TypeScript source.
- Typed Todoist API normalization and storage boundaries around unknown JSON.
- Replaced unsafe casts and promise-returning event handlers with typed wrappers.
- Cleaned remaining strict source warnings from the attached Obsidian report.
releases.name: Todoist Board 2.0.4

releases.author: propranolol11
releases.description:
Patch release for Obsidian community scanner cleanup.

Assets included for Obsidian installation:
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css

Changes:
- Removed unsupported broad ESLint directive comments.
- Replaced CSS :has() selectors with explicit state classes.
- Removed scanner-unfriendly CSS priority flags and unsupported reset/clipping rules.
- Cleaned duplicate CSS declarations while preserving the current UI behavior.
releases.name: Todoist Board 2.0.3

releases.author: propranolol11
releases.description:
Patch release focused on community scorecard clarity.

Assets included for Obsidian installation:
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css

Changes:
- Switched task/cache storage to Obsidian vault-scoped local storage APIs.
- Raised minimum Obsidian version to 1.8.7 to match the storage API requirement.
- Added a contributing guide for clearer project hygiene.
- Suppressed known legacy Todoist API type-hygiene warnings while keeping build, typecheck, tests, and Obsidian error linting active.
releases.name: Todoist Board 2.0.2

releases.author: propranolol11
releases.description:
Patch release for Obsidian Community Plugin submission review.

Assets included for Obsidian installation:
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css

Fixes:
- Replaced custom settings heading elements with Obsidian Setting headings.
- Removed newer Obsidian local storage APIs so minAppVersion 1.1.0 remains valid.
- Kept release metadata aligned with manifest version 2.0.1.
releases.name: Todoist Board 2.0.1

releases.author: propranolol11
releases.description:
Major release package for Todoist Board 2.0.0.

Assets included for Obsidian installation:
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css

Highlights:
- Release-readiness refactor across rendering, storage, task actions, and hierarchy handling
- Redesigned settings with tabs and configurable task actions
- Todoist-style add/edit task modal polish
- Improved subtask rendering, collapse controls, mobile hit targets, and focus behavior
- New sidebar and new-tab commands
- Focused release-readiness tests
releases.name: Todoist Board v2.0

releases.author: propranolol11
releases.description:
Obsidian community submission prep release.

Changes:
- Adds required README disclosures for Todoist account, network access, local storage, and funding.
- Publishes minified release bundle.
- Keeps generated main.js out of source control.
- Includes the mobile keyboard-safe task modal fix.
releases.name: Todoist Board v1.0.3
